title: Palindrome Number
description: Given an integer x, return true exactly when its usual base-10 representation reads the same from left to right and right to left. A negative integer is not a palindrome because its leading minus sign has no matching trailing sign. The value 0 is a palindrome. Do not add leading zeroes when interpreting the representation.
output_contract: Return a bool; integer values such as 0 and 1 are not accepted as substitutes.
